IPL 2026 playoff scenarios: What MI need to do and why time is running out
description: Mumbai Indians' IPL 2026 playoff hopes are in dire straits after a six-wicket loss to Sunrisers Hyderabad. Despite a stellar 123* from Ryan Rickelton, MI's bowling woes persist, leaving them with a daunting task of winning nearly all remaining matches. Their poor net run rate further complicates qualification, demanding dominant victories. With 2 wins in 8 games (4 points) and a NRR of -0.784, they are far from the pack.

title: Petrol-diesel prices going up? Govt issues clarification, here’s the truth
description: The Press Information Bureau's Fact Check unit has debunked viral claims of a significant hike in petrol and diesel prices, stating no such order has been issued. A senior government official confirmed there's no current proposal to increase retail fuel prices, reassuring consumers amidst global oil market volatility. Fuel prices in major cities remain unchanged.

'Imagine the pain, humiliation': SC urges Centre to allow abortion beyond 20 weeks for rape survivors
description: The Supreme Court urged the Centre to consider amending laws to allow rape survivors to terminate pregnancies beyond 20 weeks, emphasizing no time limit in such cases. The bench highlighted the lifelong trauma for a child survivor and the need for the decision to rest with the survivor and her parents, with AIIMS offering counsel.

description: Defence minister Rajnath Singh stated India voluntarily halted Operation Sindoor on its own terms, asserting readiness for a prolonged conflict with Pakistan, which he labeled the "epicentre of International Terrorism." He emphasised India's "zero tolerance" for terrorism and its sponsors, highlighting the nation's robust military capabilities and resolve against nuclear threats.

Loud DJ music kills 140 chickens in UP's Sultanpur; case filed against operator
description: A poultry farm owner in Sultanpur district claims 140 chickens died after a wedding procession played loud DJ music. The incident occurred on April 25, 2026, near his farm in Dariyapur village. The owner alleges the intense noise caused panic and death among the birds. Police have filed an FIR against the DJ operator.

Exit poll results 2026 for Bengal, Tamil Nadu, Assam, Kerala, Puducherry: Explained in 5 charts
description: Exit polls suggest a mixed verdict across states as West Bengal anticipates a hung assembly, potentially ending Mamata Banerjee's tenure. Tamil Nadu might see actor Vijay's TVK emerge as a significant force, challenging the established duopoly. Assam favors a BJP hat-trick, while Kerala's Left government faces a potential defeat. Puducherry's NDA is expected to retain power.

description: The Pentagon estimates the war with Iran has cost $25 billion, though sources suggest the true figure could reach $50 billion due to unincluded repair costs. Officials defended the ongoing conflict, calling it an "existential fight" and dismissing concerns of it becoming a "quagmire."

No lungi, no vote? CAPF faces backlash in Bengal as elderly voters stopped over attire
description: Central forces personnel at a polling booth in Gaighata allegedly prevented elderly men from voting in their lungis, citing dress code violations. This led to protests from villagers and Trinamool members, who accused the forces of harassment. The restriction was later withdrawn after the unrest.

title: 2 dead as car plunges into 150-foot-deep gorge in Himachal Pradesh
description: Two men died after their car fell into a 150-foot gorge and caught fire on the Bharwain-Hoshiarpur road in Una district. The occupants, returning from Chintpurni temple, were charred to death. In a separate incident, over a dozen Delhi devotees were injured when their mini-van rolled off the road in Bilaspur district.

title: West Bengal polls: VIP treatment for 104-year-old who fought SIR & won
description: A 104-year-old voter, Sk Ibrahim, who has voted since Independence, faced anxiety when his name was initially removed from the electoral roll due to a name discrepancy. Despite missing the vote-from-home option, the East Burdwan administration facilitated his visit to the polling booth. Ibrahim, sharp and lucid, expressed happiness at voting again, questioning the initial adjudication.

title: Former BJP MLC Manoj Kumar Singh's nephew shot dead in Bihar road rage
description: In a heartbreaking episode in Siwan district, 28-year-old Harsh Kumar Singh lost his life due to a road rage altercation that left his father, Chandan Singh, in critical condition. What started as a minor accident spiraled into chaos when gunfire erupted amidst the escalating confrontation. Authorities are now in pursuit of the assailants with ongoing investigations and raid operations.

title: 1 dead, 4 hurt as ‘baraatis’ lose cool over cooler air in Azamgarh
description: In the heart of Azamgarh, a wedding that promised love and joy devolved into a nightmare as a quarrel about a desert cooler's placement ignited a violent confrontation. Sadly, the incident claimed the life of Amir Chandra Sahani and left four other attendees in critical condition.

title: Justice dept sues $5B tech firm for excluding Americans from applying to high-paying jobs
description: The US Department of Justice is suing tech firm Cloudera for allegedly discriminating against American job seekers. Prosecutors claim the company created a sham hiring process, favoring temporary visa holders for lucrative roles and actively deterring US workers. This lawsuit highlights the DOJ's commitment to protecting domestic employment opportunities.

title: Chennai horror: Man hacks social media influencer wife to death, then dies by suicide
description: A domestic dispute in Adambakkam tragically ended with a husband allegedly killing his wife, a social media influencer, before taking his own life. The unemployed husband, reportedly facing financial strain, attacked his wife, who was the family's sole earner. Their younger son discovered the grim scene upon returning home. Authorities are investigating the incident.
